articles.title: What Really Fails a GCC?
articles.author: Shammi Prabhakar Singh
articles.summary: The invisible killers of GCC performance — governance gaps, mandate misalignment, and the absence of a clear India P&L owner. Most GCC failures are quiet, not dramatic.

articles.title: 2025: The Year Everyone Was Talking About GCC
articles.author: Shammi Prabhakar Singh
articles.summary: 2025 was the year GCC moved from back-office narrative to board-level conversation. What actually shifted — and what it means for 2026.

articles.title: Hyderabad vs Pune: GCC Battle for Scale vs Depth
articles.author: Shammi Prabhakar Singh
articles.summary: Two of India's fastest-growing GCC cities are taking very different paths. Who wins the next wave of global mandates — and why the answer is more nuanced than the numbers suggest.
